evals.prompt: 使用 product-delivery-skill-chain，从一句需求开始跑链路：我们要做一个课程会员订阅功能，用户订阅后可以观看付费课程。请先判断当前阶段，必要时澄清，然后推进到 PRD。不要直接进入开发。
evals.expected_output: The assistant should enter the chain from requirement exploration, create or plan delivery-chain-status.md, avoid jumping directly to PRD or implementation from a vague requirement, and stop at the PRD gate or ask the highest-value blocking question.
expectations: Identifies the entry stage as requirements rather than PRD, technical design, tasks, or implementation.
Routes first to requirement-exploration because the requirement is incomplete.
Creates or plans to maintain delivery-chain-status.md because the chain skill was invoked.
Does not generate technical design, tasks, audit standards, or implementation before the PRD is ready.
Asks one focused blocking question if the requirement is too vague to proceed.
assertions: Identifies the entry stage as requirements rather than PRD, technical design, tasks, or implementation.
Routes first to requirement-exploration because the requirement is incomplete.
Creates or plans to maintain delivery-chain-status.md because the chain skill was invoked.
Does not generate technical design, tasks, audit standards, or implementation before the PRD is ready.
Asks one focused blocking question if the requirement is too vague to proceed.

evals.prompt: 使用 product-delivery-skill-chain，从已有 PRD product-delivery-skill-chain/evals/files/chain-demo/docs/member-renewal-prd.md 开始，继续生成技术设计、审核标准和任务归档。没有指定终点。
evals.expected_output: The assistant should treat the PRD as the entry artifact, skip requirement exploration, maintain delivery-chain-status.md beside the PRD, run or plan technical design and audit standards after the PRD gate, create formal tasks after technical design, and stop before coding for confirmation.
expectations: Records PRD as the requested entry stage and source artifact.
Skips requirement exploration with an explicit reason instead of restarting upstream work.
Maintains delivery-chain-status.md because the chain skill was invoked.
Plans technical design and audit standards after PRD approval, with parallel execution only if authorized and available.
Creates formal tasks after technical design by default.
Stops before coding and requests confirmation unless full-auto was explicitly authorized.

evals.prompt: 使用 product-delivery-skill-chain，从 PRD product-delivery-skill-chain/evals/files/chain-demo/specs/invoice/prd.md 开始，用快速模式：技术设计、审核标准、任务草案尽量并行，最后整理成正式 tasks.md。
evals.expected_output: The assistant should enter fast planning mode, treat parallelism as conditional on tool/user authorization, mark the task output as draft until technical design completes, reconcile tasks and audit standards against technical design, then save or plan a formal reconciled task archive.
expectations: Recognizes fast planning mode from the prompt.
Checks whether actual parallel execution is authorized and available before using subagents or workers.
Marks task output as draft and pending technical design confirmation during parallel planning.
Reconciles draft tasks against technical design decisions before treating tasks as formal.
Reconciles audit standards against technical risks discovered in the design.
Records execution mode and reconciliation decisions in delivery-chain-status.md.
assertions: Recognizes fast planning mode from the prompt.
Checks whether actual parallel execution is authorized and available before using subagents or workers.
Marks task output as draft and pending technical design confirmation during parallel planning.
Reconciles draft tasks against technical design decisions before treating tasks as formal.
Reconciles audit standards against technical risks discovered in the design.
Records execution mode and reconciliation decisions in delivery-chain-status.md.

evals.prompt: 使用 product-delivery-skill-chain，继续上次那个需求。我记不清文件路径了，你帮我找一下当前目录里最新的 PRD、technical-design、tasks 和审核标准，然后继续往下。
evals.expected_output: The assistant should use resume mode, conservatively discover candidate artifacts, use one obvious candidate with stated inference or ask the user to choose among multiple candidates, update delivery-chain-status.md, and continue only after the source artifact is trustworthy.
expectations: Classifies the request as resume mode.
Conservatively discovers candidate artifacts instead of silently choosing unrelated files.
Uses a single obvious candidate only with an explicit inference.
Asks the user to choose if multiple plausible candidates exist.
Does not use stale or mismatched artifacts without confirmation.
Updates or creates delivery-chain-status.md for the resumed chain.

evals.prompt: 使用 product-delivery-skill-chain，从 product-delivery-skill-chain/evals/files/chain-demo/specs/billing/tasks.md 开始执行开发。PRD 和技术方案也在同目录下。先别全自动，开始写代码前让我确认。

evals.prompt: 不要用 product-delivery-skill-chain，直接用 prd-task-archiver 基于 product-delivery-skill-chain/evals/files/chain-demo/docs/refund-prd.md 拆任务并保存 product-delivery-skill-chain/evals/files/chain-demo/docs/refund-tasks.md。
evals.expected_output: The assistant should not use the chain skill, should route directly to prd-task-archiver, should not create delivery-chain-status.md, and should follow the downstream skill's own rules.

evals.prompt: 使用 product-delivery-skill-chain。前面已经做过很长的需求访谈，PRD 已经保存到 product-delivery-skill-chain/evals/files/chain-demo/docs/member-renewal-prd.md。请从 PRD 继续到技术设计、审核标准和任务归档，不要复述前面的访谈过程，只保留关键决策、阻塞项和下一步。
